description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a distinctive semi-circular flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The exterior features a combination of smooth concrete and metal panels, with large rectangular windows on the upper floor providing ample natural light. The ground floor includes a covered entryway, visible garage-style doors, and a small outdoor area with scattered objects and debris. The interior is partially visible, revealing an open-plan layout with a central staircase, contemporary furniture, and pops of color from chairs and decor. The house also features a balcony or overhang on the upper level, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and geometric forms. Sculptural human figures are present on the roof and near the entrance, adding an artistic touch to the property.
description: A modern two-story house with a semi-circular flat roof, large windows, and minimalist design, featuring visible interior spaces and artistic elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large upper windows, a covered entryway, garage doors, and scattered outdoor items.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the open-plan interior, central staircase, colorful furniture, and partial view of the balcony.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the semi-circular roof, open lower level, visible staircase, and a round table with pink chairs.
description_view_3: Alternate front view with a focus on the sculptural figures on the roof and near the entrance, as well as the illuminated upper windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with overhang, wide steps, and minimalistic door design
